pitch: The plant that understands itself — from feedstock truck to gas in the grid.

master.layout: A square plant seen from above, four process quadrants, material flowing clockwise around the perimeter. Q1 south-west: covered receiving hall with weighbridge (truck gate on the south facade). Q2 north-west: pre-treatment hall, cutaway roof. Q3 north-east: open yard with dome digester tanks and a gas holder. Q4 south-east: energy building and dispatch bay (truck gate on the south facade). A low CONTROL-ROOM ANNEX sits on the south facade BETWEEN the two truck gates, windows overlooking the halls, desks with ordinary desktop computers inside. Thin pipe and conveyor bridges carry material across quadrant boundaries.
master.note: Master still is approved FIRST; quadrant stills derive from it. Threads are added at quadrant level, plus a threaded re-render of the master for the orbit finale.

quadrants.name: Receiving
stations: wheel loader feeding an intake hopper
quadrants.material_in: feedstock truck entering through the south gate
quadrants.material_out: feedstock conveyor leaving through the wall into Q2
data_orange: worker with glowing tablet logging the delivery at the weighbridge
worker speaking a voice note into a glowing handheld beside the bunker

copy.title: It starts at the gate.
copy.body: Every load logged the moment it arrives — spoken, photographed, structured.

quadrants.name: Pre-treatment
quadrants.material_in: feedstock conveyor entering through the wall from Q1
quadrants.material_out: slurry pipe leaving through the wall toward the digesters in Q3
data_orange: operator photographing a foreign object pulled from the shredder with a glowing phone
data_azure: temperature sensor puck on a pasteurizer tank
flow sensor puck on the slurry pump

copy.title: Machines talk. So does your team.
copy.body: Sensor data and human observations flow into one stream — even from your oldest machine.

quadrants.name: Digestion
quadrants.material_in: slurry pipe entering the yard from Q2
quadrants.material_out: biogas pipe and digestate pipe leaving toward Q4
data_orange: operator on an inspection round holding a glowing tablet at the digester stairs
data_azure: gas flow sensor puck on the biogas pipe
temperature sensor puck on a digester dome

copy.title: Forty days in the tank, nothing lost.
copy.body: Every batch keeps its trail — what went in, how it ran, what came out.

quadrants.name: Energy & dispatch
quadrants.material_in: biogas and digestate pipes entering from Q3
quadrants.material_out: FINISHED: gas-to-grid pipe leaving the building, digestate truck exiting through the south gate
data_orange: technician photographing the engine HMI panel with a glowing phone
data_azure: energy meter sensor puck on the CHP
weight sensor puck at the loadout

copy.title: One living picture of your plant.
copy.body: Material, machine, moment — linked. Ask a question, get a cited answer.

orbit.content: After Q4 the camera turns the last corner onto the front facade and glides past the control-room annex (desks, desktop monitors behind the windows, ONE thread descending from above into a monitor), then rises and orbits the whole square plant: threads from all four quadrants rising and interlinking into one constellation floating above the plant, the full circuit visible — truck in at one gate, around the quadrants, truck out at the other.

copy.title: See your whole operation.
copy.body: New understanding becomes the new standard — on the floor, next shift.
